name: Exception
description: Represents a specific adjustment or manual correction to an employee's attendance records for a given date range. Used for leave management, manual attendance corrections, and special pay components like Gift Minutes.

project_id.description: Reference to the Project this exception belongs to.

attendance_id.description: Attendance ID of the employee. Use 'ALL' for company-wide exceptions.

date_from.description: Start date of the exception period (inclusive).

date_to.description: End date of the exception period (inclusive).

allowed_minutes.description: Numeric value for minute-based exceptions (like Gift Minutes or allowed late minutes).

use_in_analysis.description: Whether this exception should be factored into the attendance calculation engine.

created_from_report.description: Flag indicating if the exception was generated from a report edit.

report_run_id.description: Link to the specific report run that generated this exception if applicable.
